race.comment: ICE KOOL (6) resumes after going quickly through the grades in his first prep. Sent north at his third race start with a fast finishing seventh from the wide gate over 1100m at the Gold Coast in the Sunlight Stakes last January. Primed with the two good trial wins and ready to win. BIG RED TEQUILA (3) resumes with a handy winning CV. Rounded up a strong field with the 61.5kg for a gritty win over 1100m at Warwick Farm last February. Wasn't pushed out in her two trials and adept in all conditions. Hard to hold out. AMAZING EAGLE (1) stalked the pace and loomed strongly before he peaked on the run with a narrow second over this track and trip. Will appreciate a firmer surface and can score a long overdue win. DEAR JEWEL (16) has gone to a new level this prep and she gets a much better run today from the low draw. Value contender who can surprise some of the more fancied rivals. VELLA'S BEST (10) tough on-pace sprinter who will give a ton of cheek from the gate.
